description:
'''Comedy hip-hop''' or '''comedy rap''' is a subgenre of [[Hip-hop|hip-hop music]] designed to be amusing or comedic, compared to artists who incorporate humor into their more serious, purist hip-hop styles. Many examples of comedy hip-hop are parodic.

'''Satirical hip-hop''' is a variant of comedy hip-hop done in a sarcastic, [[Parody|parodic]], or [[deadpan]] way.

'''[[Internet meme|Meme]] rap''' (or '''ironic rap''') is a form of comedy rap, which grew out of the [[SoundCloud rap]] movement and achieved some mainstream success during the 2010s and 2020s. Notable examples include artist [[Yuno Miles]].

mixes.help_reason: Hard to find a single mix or playlist because this is such a diverse field, with a great many subjects being covered. Let me know if you find something that covers the breadth of the genre.
